description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into this pair of mid-calf high socks from quiksilver. Crafted from soft, stretchable fabric, these socks have been designed for the confident executive.Made of 80% cotton, 18% polyamide and 2% elastanePadded footbed for cushioned comfortSeamless stitch for abrasion-free wearRib knit slim cuff for a comfortable wearRoomy toe area for superior comfort and durabilityBranding text and logo on the foot regionSock careWash inside outWash dark colours separatelyDo not iron, dry clean or tumble dryDry in shade
